How the field team prepares when a storm surge is forecast.

- [fact] The team hauls out every skiff once the surge forecast tops one metre above the predicted tide #fieldwork
- [decision] Fieldwork is stood down for the day the moment a surge warning is issued, no exceptions #fieldwork
